title: santalum lanceolatum var. typicum
intro: Santalum lanceolatum var. typicum, also known as the lanceolate sandalwood, is a variety of sandalwood tree native to Australia. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant properties. The health benefits associated with Santalum lanceolatum var. typicum include reducing stress and anxiety, improving sleep quality, and supporting immune function. The plant can be prepared into various herbal forms, including essential oils, teas, and infusions, which can be used topically or internally to harness its medicinal benefits.
